title: Totem's renamed
description: Rename your totem for a custom texture
body:
# Totem's renamed!
Finally not that boring texture...

## Info

This resource pack does not require any mod. Currently it contains 19 different rename options, but theres soon to be more! If you have any ideas for new textures, just let me know!

## List of currently existing renames:

1. Allay totem
2. Amethyst totem
3. Coal totem
4. Copper totem
5. Diamond totem
6. Emerald totem
7. End totem
8. Gold totem
9. Happy ghast totem
10. Honey totem
11. Iron totem
12. Lapis totem
13. Nether totem
14. Netherite totem
15. Patrick totem
16. Phantom totem
17. Pickle Rick totem
18. Villager totem
19. Wither totem

## Preview

![Preview of the pack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3254e00fab1846e182c2c60c8231b3fa3d7425b.png)

### Note !!!
If the totems name does not match any of the names above (including capital errors) the texture will still be the normal totem
